name: Круг Энтропии
description: Druids of the Circle of Entropy see doom as a constant of the natural world. Lives end, works erode, and the civilizations of Etharis ultimately come to ruin. The inevitable end of the old brings opportunity for the new. These fatalistic Druids see themselves as agents of ruin, ending those whose time has passed to make space for those whose time has yet to come.
shortDescription: Become an Instrument of Decay and Ruin

features.name: Catastrophic Power
features.description: You have mastered talents, both magical and martial, in your pursuit of the inevitable destruction of mortals and their works. When you finish a {@variantrule Short|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you gain one of the following benefits until you finish your next {@variantrule Short|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

details.elementalCataclysm: {@b Elemental Cataclysm.} As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can expend a spell slot to cause elemental energy to burst in a 10-foot-radius {@variantrule Sphere|XPHB} centered on a point within 60 feet of yourself. Choose a damage type: Acid, Cold, Fire, or Lightning. Each creature in the {@variantrule Sphere|XPHB} must make a Dexterity saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, a creature takes {@dice 1d6} damage of the chosen type per level of the spell slot expended, and then has {@status Vulnerability} to that damage type for 1 minute. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the {@status Vulnerability} on a success.
details.ruinousSmite: {@b Ruinous Smite.} Once per turn when you deal damage with an attack with a weapon or an {@action Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, you can choose to expend a spell slot to deal an extra {@dice 1d8} Necrotic damage, plus another {@dice 1d8} per level of the spell slot.
details.weaponMastery: {@b Weapon Mastery.} Your supernatural connection to destruction allows you to use the mastery property of one kind of weapon of your choice with which you have proficiency, such as {@item Shortbows|XPHB} or {@item Quarterstaffs|XPHB}. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can change the kind of weapon you choose.

features.name: Ruin Incarnate
features.description: As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape to adopt an aspect of entropy and the inevitable end of all things for 10 minutes. You gain the following benefits: {@b All Things Pass.} You have {@status Advantage} on attack rolls against {@status Bloodied} creatures. {@b Inexorable Onslaught.} You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action on your turn. {@b Ironskin Armor.} Your base AC becomes 17 plus your Wisdom modifier (minimum of +1) if your AC is lower than that.

features.name: Entropic Ward
features.description: Your connection to the forces of entropy shields you. When a creature you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by an amount equal to {@dice 1d10} + your Wisdom modifier + your Druid level. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Accelerated Decay
features.description: Your entropic power causes weapons and armor to corrode upon contact. When you hit a creature with a weapon attack while your Ruin Incarnate feature is active, the target's AC is reduced by 1 until the end of your next turn (this can stack up to 3 times). Additionally, the Necrotic damage from your Ruinous Smite ignores resistance.

features.name: Herald of the End
features.description: You become an avatar of destruction. While your Ruin Incarnate feature is active, you gain the following additional benefits: You have resistance to all damage. When you reduce a creature to 0 hit points, you regain one expended use of Wild Shape. Your Elemental Cataclysm deals additional damage equal to your Wisdom modifier to each creature that fails its saving throw.
